name: Copycat
text: View a center card. Copy that role
description: The Copycat looks at one of the center cards. They take on all the properties of that role, including waking up when that card would've woken up, and doing their night action.
nightAction: Look at one of the center cards. You are now a copy of that role. If that role is called, wake up and do that night action.
nightActionDetailed: If you click a center card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you view that card and copy it. If your viewed card has a night action, you do it when that role would do it.

name: Sentinel
text: May place a shield token
description: The Sentinel may place a Shield Token on any other player's card. A card with a Shield Token cannot be moved or viewed by any player.
nightAction: You place a shield token on any player's card except your own.
nightActionDetailed: If you click another player's card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you place a shield token onto your selected card.

name: Doppelganger
text: View another player's card. Copy their role
description: The Doppelganger must look at another player's card, which causes them to take on the properties of the card they looked at. If they viewed a card that has a night action, they immediately do that action (with some exceptions).
nightAction: Look at another player's card. You are now a copy of that role. If your new role has a night action, do it now.
nightActionDetailed: If you click another player's card you select. If you click 'confirm' you view that card and copy it. If your viewed card has a night action, you immediately do it (with some exceptions).
specialInteractions: If the Doppelganger looks at the Copycat, the Doppelganger immediately looks at a center card and copies that role. If that new role has a night action, the Doppelganger immediately does it (with some exceptions).

name: Werewolf
text: See other werewolves. If alone, may view 1 center card
description: The Werewolf learns who the other werewolves are. If there is only one werewolf player, they may look at one of the center cards.
nightAction: Werewolves wake up and look for other werewolves. If there is only one werewolf, you may look at a card from the center.
nightActionDetailed: When you wake up, all players who are werewolves are shown to you as werewolves. If there are other werewolves click 'ok' to confirm you saw the others. If you woke alone, you may click a center card to select it. If you click 'confirm', you view your selected card.

name: Werewolf
text: See other werewolves. If alone, may view 1 center card
description: The Werewolf learns who the other werewolves are. If there is only one werewolf player, they may look at one of the center cards.
nightAction: Werewolves wake up and look for other werewolves. If there is only one werewolf, you may look at a card from the center.
nightActionDetailed: When you wake up, all players who are werewolves are shown to you as werewolves. If there are other werewolves click 'ok' to confirm you saw the others. If you woke alone, you may click a center card to select it. If you click 'confirm', you view your selected card.

name: Cow
text: Werewolves know him. Knows if he has werewolf neighbor
description: All Werewolves (not the Dream Wolf) learn who the Cow is. The Cow learns if at least one of their neighbors is a werewolf.

name: Alpha Wolf
text: Swap center wolf card with other player
description: The Alpha Wolf learns who the other werewolves are. If there is only one werewolf player, they may look at one of the centre cards. At the start of the game, one additional Werewolf is added to the end of the centre cards, which the Alpha Wolf must swap with any other player's card.
nightAction: You must exchange the center werewolf card with any other player's card.
nightActionDetailed: If you click another player's card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you swap the center werewolf card with your selected card.

name: Mystic Wolf
text: May view a player's card
description: The Mystic Wolf learns who the other werewolves are. If there is only one werewolf player, they may look at one of the centre cards. The Mystic Wolf may additionally view any other player's card.
nightAction: You may at another player's card.
nightActionDetailed: If you click another player's card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you view your selected card.

name: Minion
text: See werewolves, but they not him
description: The Minion learns who the werewolves are, but the werewolves don't learn who the minion is.
nightAction: Werewolves stick out your thumbs so the Minion can see who you are.
nightActionDetailed: When you wake up, all players who are werewolves are shown to you as werewolves.
votingRules: If you die during voting and there are werewolves, the werewolf team wins. If you die and there are no werewolves, the Villager team wins.

name: Mason
text: See the other Mason
description: The Mason learns who the other Mason(s) are.
nightAction: Wake up and look for the other Mason.
nightActionDetailed: When you wake up, all players who are Masons will be shown to you. If only you wake as a Mason, then the other Mason is in the middle.

name: Mason
text: See the other Mason
description: The Mason learns who the other Mason(s) are.
nightAction: Wake up and look for the other Mason.
nightActionDetailed: When you wake up, all players who are Masons will be shown to you. If only you wake as a Mason, then the other Mason is in the middle.

name: Seer
text: May either view 1 player´s card or 2 center cards
description: The Seer may view another player's card, or two of the center cards.
nightAction: You may either look at another player's card or two of the center cards.
nightActionDetailed: If you click another player's card, you select it (and unselect all selected center cards). If you click a center card, you select it (and unselect a selected player's card). If you select 1 player's card or exactly 2 center cards, a 'confirm' button appears. If you click 'confirm', you view the selected cards.

name: Apprentice Seer
text: May view 1 center card
description: The Apprentice Seer may view one of the center cards.
nightAction: You may look at one of the center cards.
nightActionDetailed: If you click a center card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you view your selected card.

name: Paranormal Investigator
text: May view up to 2 player's cards. Becomes bad if sees bad
description: The Paranormal Investigator may investigate up to two other players' cards. If they view the card that is not a Villager role, they become that role and gain its win condition.
nightAction: You may look at up to 2 cards of other players. If you see a role that is not on the Villager team, you are now the role you viewed.
nightActionDetailed: If you click a player's card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you view that card. If it is not a Villager role, you are now that role. Otherwise if you select another card and click 'confirm', you view it and again if you see a role that is not on the Villager team, you are that role.

name: Robber
text: May swap own card with other player. Then view it
description: The Robber may swap their card with another player's card. They then view their new card.
nightAction: You may exchange your card with another player's card and then view your new card.
nightActionDetailed: If you click another player's card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you perform the swap.

name: Witch
text: May view 1 center card and swap with any player
description: The Witch may look at one of the center cards. If they do, they must swap that card with any player's card.
nightAction: You may look at one of the center cards. If you do you must exchange that card with any player's card.
nightActionDetailed: If you click a center card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you see your selected center card. If you viewed a center card and you click a player's card you select it. If you click 'confirm' you swap your selected center card with your selected player's card.

name: Troublemaker
text: May swap two other players' cards
description: The Troublemaker may swap the cards of any two other players, without viewing them.
nightAction: You may exchange cards between two other players.
nightActionDetailed: If you click a card, you select it. If you click it again you unselect it. If you selected exactly two other player's cards, a confirm button appears. If you click 'confirm', your two selected cards get swapped.

name: Drunk
text: Swap your card with center
description: The Drunk must swap their card with one of the center cards, without viewing their new card.
nightAction: You must exchange your card with one from the center.
nightActionDetailed: If you click a center card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you swap your card with the selected card.

name: Insomniac
text: Look at your card at night´s end
description: The Insomniac views their own card at the end of the night.
nightAction: Look at your card.
nightActionDetailed: When all players that do their night action before you, have done their night action, your card gets automatically shown to you.

name: Revealer
text: May turn over 1 other player's card if village
description: The Revealer may turn over any other player's card. If they reveal the card of a player that is not on Team Town, they must turn it face down again; otherwise, they leave it face up.
nightAction: You may turn any other player's card face up. If the card you reveal is not on the villager's team, turn it back over face down.
nightActionDetailed: If you click another player's card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you turn it over. If that card is not on the Villager Team, the card turns face down again.

name: Exposer
text: May turn over 1 center card
description: The Exposer may turn over one of the center cards.
nightAction: You may turn over 1 center card face up.
nightActionDetailed: If you click a center card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you turn over your selected card face up.

name: Blob
text: If players near you survive, you win
description: During the night, the Blob will discover who is part of the Blob. They win if they manage to keep all members of the Blob alive.

name: Mortician
text: May view random card. Wins if any neighbor dies
description: The Mortician looks at a card randomly, either of themselves or of either of their neighbors.
nightAction: You may look at a card from ... (random action of: yourself, either neighbor, left neighbor, right neighbor, both neighbors.
nightActionDetailed: If you can decide between one of your neighbors and you click a card, you select it. If you click 'confirm', you view your selected card. If you do not have a choice which card to view, the Website automatically displays the correct card(s).

name: Villager
text: No special ability
description: The Villager doesn't wake up during the night.

name: Villager
text: No special ability
description: The Villager doesn't wake up during the night.

name: Villager
text: No special ability
description: The Villager doesn't wake up during the night.

name: Hunter
text: If killed, player they voted for dies, too
description: The Hunter doesn't wake up during the night. If they are killed, the player they voted dies as well.

name: Tanner
text: Wins if killed
description: The Tanner doesn't wake up during the night. If the Tanner dies, the Tanner wins.
specialRules: If the Tanner dies, the Werewolf Team loses. If the Tanner dies and a werewolf dies, the Tanner and Villager Team wins.

name: Dream Wolf
text: Does not wake up. Known by other wolves
description: The Dream Wolf doesn't wake up during the night. They don't know who the werewolves are, but the other werewolves know who the Dream Wolf is.

name: Bodyguard
text: Player they voted for cannot die
description: The Bodyguard doesn't wake up during the night. The player they vote cannot die and any votes that player received do not count. If that player has the highest amount of votes, the player with the second highest amount of votes is killed instead.

name: Prince
text: Votes for him do not count
description: The Prince doesn't wake up during the night. Any votes the Prince received do not count. If they have the highest amount of votes, the player with the second highest amount of votes is killed instead.

name: Cursed
text: Becomes a werewolf, if voted for by one
description: The Cursed doesn't wake up during the night. If they are voted for by a werewolf, they transform into a werewolf and join Team Werewolf.
